The ties close the bag to keep the contents secure from theft or accidental spil
[PDF_PAGE 53 | score=1] Delivery Service Disc/Discus Name EP Cost Book/Page Name Delivery Service Delivery Network, Express Desk, Restudying Desk, Studying Device, Passage Diadem, Disenchantment Diadem, Doom's This gnomish delivery system consists of small trading posts equipped with catapults, launching ramps, and square wooden wings. When a delivery is needed, the gnomes fasten the wings to the merchandise, load the whole thing on a catapult and launch it to the next trading post. Upon arrival, a large cloth opens above the merchandise and softens its fall. 1/mile 3/mile AC11-091 Desk A desk is a piece of furniture, almost always made of wood, used for studying, working, writing, or reading.
